labelLink.label: Invoice
EN 16931 invoice semantic root.
Invoice number
An invoice shall have an invoice number.
Invoice issue date
The date when the invoice was issued.
Invoice type code
Code specifying the functional type of invoice.
Document currency code
The currency in which all Invoice amounts are given, except for the Total VAT amount in accounting currency.
Tax accounting currency code
The currency used for VAT accounting and reporting purposes as accepted or required in the country of the Seller.
Value added tax point date
The date when the VAT becomes accountable for the Seller and for the Buyer in so far as that date can be determined and differs from the date of issue of the invoice, according to the VAT directive.
Value added tax point date code
The code of the date when the VAT becomes accountable for the Seller and for the Buyer.
Payment due date
The date when the payment is due.
Buyer reference
An identifier assigned by the Buyer used for internal routing purposes.
Project reference
The identification of the project the invoice refers to
Contract reference
The identification of a contract.
Purchase order reference
An identifier of a referenced purchase order, issued by the Buyer.
Sales order reference
An identifier of a referenced sales order, issued by the Seller.
Receiving advice reference
An identifier of a referenced receiving advice.
Despatch advice reference
An identifier of a referenced despatch advice. The identification of the call for
Tender or lot reference

tender or lot the invoice relates to. An identifier for an object on which the invoice is based, given by the Seller. The identification scheme identifier of the Invoiced object identifier. A textual value that specifies where
Invoiced object identifier
An identifier for an object on which the invoice is based, given by the Seller.
Buyer accounting reference
A textual value that specifies where to book the relevant data into the Buyer's financial accounts.
Payment terms
A textual description of the payment terms that apply to the amount due for payment (Including description of possible penalties). A group of business terms providing
Invoice note
textual notes that are relevant for the invoice, together with an indication of the note subject.
Business process type
context in which the transaction appears, to enable the Buyer to process the Invoice in an appropriate way. An identification of the specification containing the total set of rules
Specification identifier
regarding semantic content, cardinalities and business rules to
Preceding invoice reference
A group of business terms providing information on one or more preceding Invoices.
Seller name
Seller is registered in the national registry of legal entities or as a Taxable person or otherwise trades as a person or persons. A name by which the Seller is
Seller trading name
Name under which the seller trades.
Seller identifier
The identification scheme identifier of the Seller identifier. An identifier issued by an official
Seller legal registration identifier

registrar that identifies the Seller as a legal entity or person. The identification scheme identifier of the Seller legal registration identifier. The Seller's VAT identifier (also known as Seller VAT identification
Seller VAT identifier
number). The local identification (defined by the Seller’s address) of the Seller for tax purposes or a reference that enables the Seller to state his
Seller tax registration identifier
registered tax status.
Seller additional legal information
Additional legal information relevant for the Seller.
Seller electronic address
address to which the application level response to the invoice may be delivered. The identification scheme identifier of the Seller electronic address. A group of business terms providing
Seller address line 1
The main address line in an address. An additional address line in an
Seller address line 2
address that can be used to give further details supplementing the main line. An additional address line in an
Seller address line 3
address that can be used to give further details supplementing the main line. The common name of the city, town
Seller city
or village, where the Seller address is located. The identifier for an addressable
Seller post code
group of properties according to the relevant postal service.
Seller country subdivision
The subdivision of a country.
Seller country code
A group of business terms providing contact information about the Seller.
Seller contact point
A contact point for a legal entity or person.
Seller contact telephone number
A phone number for the contact point.
Seller contact email address
A group of business terms providing information about the Buyer.
Buyer name
The full name of the Buyer. A name by which the Buyer is
Buyer trading name
known, other than Buyer name (also known as Business name). An identifier of the Buyer.
Buyer identifier
The identification scheme identifier
Buyer legal registration identifier
An identifier issued by an official registrar that identifies the Buyer as a legal entity or person. The identification scheme identifier of the Buyer legal registration identifier.
Buyer VAT identifier
The Buyer's VAT identifier (also known as Buyer VAT identification number). Identifies the Buyer's electronic
Buyer electronic address
address to which the invoice is delivered. The identification scheme identifier of the Buyer electronic address. A group of business terms providing
Buyer address line 1
The main address line in an address. An additional address line in an
Buyer address line 2
address that can be used to give
Buyer address line 3
address that can be used to give further details supplementing the main line. The common name of the city, town
Buyer city
or village, where the Buyer's address is located. The identifier for an addressable
Buyer post code
group of properties according to the relevant postal service.
Buyer country subdivision
The subdivision of a country.
Buyer country code
A code that identifies the country.
Buyer contact point
person. A phone number for the contact
Buyer contact telephone number
point.
Buyer contact email address
An e-mail address for the contact point.
Payee name
The name of the Payee. An identifier for the Payee.
Payee identifier
The identification scheme identifier of the Payee identifier. An identifier issued by an official registrar that identifies the Payee as
Payee legal registration identifier
a legal entity or person. The identification scheme identifier of the Payee legal registration identifier. A group of business terms providing
Seller tax representative name
The full name of the Seller's tax representative party.
Seller tax representative VAT identifier
The VAT identifier of the Seller's tax representative party. A group of business terms providing
Tax representative address line 1
The main address line in an address. An additional address line in an
Tax representative address line 2
address that can be used to give further details supplementing the main line. An additional address line in an
Tax representative address line 3
address that can be used to give further details supplementing the main line. The common name of the city, town
Tax representative city
or village, where the tax representative address is located. The identifier for an addressable
Tax representative post code
group of properties according to the relevant postal service.
Tax representative country subdivision
The subdivision of a country.
Tax representative country code
A code that identifies the country. A group of business terms providing
Deliver to party name
The name of the party to which the goods and services are delivered.
Deliver to location identifier
An identifier for the location at which the goods and services are delivered. The identification scheme identifier of the Deliver to location identifier. the date on which the supply of
Actual delivery date
goods or services was made or completed. A group of business terms providing
Invoicing period start date
starts.
Invoicing period end date
The date when the Invoice period ends.
Deliver to address line 1
The main address line in an address. An additional address line in an
Deliver to address line 2
address that can be used to give further details supplementing the main line. An additional address line in an
Deliver to address line 3
address that can be used to give further details supplementing the main line. The common name of the city, town
Deliver to city
or village, where the deliver to address is located. The identifier for an addressable
Deliver to post code
group of properties according to the relevant postal service.
Deliver to country subdivision
The subdivision of a country.
Deliver to country code
A code that identifies the country.
Payment instructions
Information about payment means.
Document level allowances
information about allowances applicable to the Invoice as a whole.
Document level charges
information about charges and taxes other than VAT, applicable to the Invoice as a whole. The amount of a charge, without
Sum of invoice line net amount
Sum of all Invoice line net amounts in the Invoice. Sum of all allowances on document
Sum of allowances on document level
level in the Invoice. Sum of all charges on document
Sum of charges on document level
level in the Invoice. The total amount of the Invoice
Invoice total amount without VAT
without VAT.
Invoice total VAT amount
The total VAT amount for the Invoice. The VAT total amount expressed in the accounting currency accepted or required in the country of the Seller.
Invoice total VAT amount in accounting currency
The total amount of the Invoice with
Invoice total amount with VAT
Invoice total amount including VAT.
Paid amount
been paid in advance. The amount to be added to the
Rounding amount
invoice total to round the amount to be paid.
Amount due for payment
The outstanding amount that is requested to be paid. A group of business terms providing
VAT breakdown
information about VAT breakdown by different categories, rates and exemption reasons Sum of all taxable amounts subject
Additional supporting documents
An identifier of the supporting
Invoice line
information on individual Invoice lines.
Invoice note subject code
The subject of the textual note in BT-22. A textual note that gives
Invoice note
unstructured information that is relevant to the Invoice as a whole. A group of business terms providing
Preceding invoice reference
The identification of an Invoice that was previously sent by the Seller. The date when the Preceding
Preceding invoice issue date
Invoice was issued.
Payment means type code
has been settled. The means, expressed as text, for
Payment means text
how a payment is expected to be or has been settled. A textual value used to establish a
Payment remittance information
Remittance information for matching payment.
Credit transfer
Payment terms textual information.
Payment card primary account number
The Primary Account Number (PAN) of the card used for payment.
Payment card holder name
The name of the payment card holder.
Mandate reference identifier
Payee for referencing the direct debit mandate. Unique banking reference identifier
Bank assigned creditor identifier
of the Payee or Seller assigned by the Payee or Seller bank.
Debited account identifier
The account to be debited by the direct debit. A group of business terms providing
Payment account identifier
payment account, at a payment service provider, to which payment should be made. The name of the payment account,
Payment account name
at a payment service provider, to which payment should be made. An identifier for the payment
Payment service provider identifier
service provider where a payment account is located. A group of business terms providing
Document level allowance amount
The amount of an allowance, without VAT. The base amount that may be used,
Document level allowance base amount
in conjunction with the document level allowance percentage, to calculate the document level allowance amount. The percentage that may be used, in
Document level allowance percentage
conjunction with the document level allowance base amount, to calculate
Document level allowance VAT category code
The VAT rate, represented as percentage that applies to the
Document level allowance VAT rate
document level allowance.
Document level allowance reason
Reason for a document level allowance.
Document level allowance reason code
The reason for the document level allowance, expressed as a code. A group of business terms providing
Document level charge amount
VAT. The base amount that may be used,
Document level charge base amount
in conjunction with the document level charge percentage, to calculate the document level charge amount. The percentage that may be used, in
Document level charge percentage
conjunction with the document level
Document level charge VAT category code
The VAT rate, represented as
Document level charge VAT rate
percentage that applies to the document level charge.
Document level charge reason
Reason for a document level charge.
Document level charge reason code
charge, expressed as a code. A group of business terms providing the monetary totals for the Invoice.
VAT category taxable amount
to a specific VAT category code and VAT category rate (if the VAT category rate is applicable). The total VAT amount for a given
VAT category tax amount
VAT amount for VAT category.
VAT category code
The VAT rate, represented as
VAT category rate
percentage that applies for the relevant VAT category. A textual statement of the reason
VAT exemption reason text
why the amount is exempted from VAT or why no VAT is being charged A coded statement of the reason for why the amount is exempted from
VAT exemption reason code
Code identifying the reason for VAT exemption.
Supporting document reference
document. A description of the supporting
Supporting document description
document. The URL (Uniform Resource Locator) that identifies where the external document is located.
External document location
The URL (Uniform Resource Locator) that identifies where the external document is located.
Attached document
An attached document embedded as binary object or sent together with the invoice. The mime code of the attached document. The file name of the attached document A group of business terms providing
Invoice line identifier
A unique identifier for the individual line within the Invoice. A textual note that gives
Invoice line note
unstructured information that is relevant to the Invoice line. An identifier for an object on which
Invoice line object identifier
Identifier for an object on which the invoice line is based.
Invoiced quantity
services) that is charged in the Invoice line. The unit of measure that applies to the invoiced quantity.
Invoiced quantity unit code
Unit of measure for invoiced quantity.
Invoice line net amount
Line net amount.
Referenced purchase order line reference
within a purchase order, issued by the Buyer. A textual value that specifies where
Invoice line buyer accounting reference
to book the relevant data into the Buyer's financial accounts. A group of business terms providing
Invoice line period start date
for this Invoice line starts.
Invoice line period end date
The date when the Invoice period for this Invoice line ends. A group of business terms providing
Invoice line allowances
information about allowances applicable to the individual Invoice line.
Invoice line charges
information about charges and taxes other than VAT applicable to the individual Invoice line.
Item net price
VAT, after subtracting item price discount. The total discount subtracted from
Item price discount
the Item gross price to calculate the Item net price. The unit price, exclusive of VAT,
Item gross price
before subtracting Item price discount.
Item price base quantity
The number of item units to which the price applies. The unit of measure that applies to
Item price base quantity unit code
the Item price base quantity. A group of business terms providing
Invoiced item VAT category code
The VAT rate, represented as
Invoiced item VAT rate
percentage that applies to the invoiced item. A group of business terms providing information about the goods and
Item name
A name for an item.
Item description
A description for an item.
Item seller identifier
An identifier, assigned by the Seller, for the item.
Item buyer identifier
An identifier, assigned by the Buyer, for the item.
Item standard identifier
An item identifier based on a registered scheme.
Item classification identifier
A code for classifying the item by its type or nature.
Item country of origin
The code identifying the country from which the item originates.
Item attributes
A group of business terms providing information about properties of the goods and services invoiced.
Invoice line allowance amount
The amount of an allowance, without VAT. The base amount that may be used,
Invoice line allowance base amount
in conjunction with the Invoice line allowance percentage, to calculate the Invoice line allowance amount. The percentage that may be used, in
Invoice line allowance percentage
conjunction with the Invoice line allowance base amount, to calculate the Invoice line allowance amount.
Invoice line allowance reason
Reason for line allowance.
Invoice line allowance reason code
The reason for the Invoice line allowance, expressed as a code. A group of business terms providing
Invoice line charge amount
The amount of a charge, without VAT. The base amount that may be used,
Invoice line charge base amount
in conjunction with the Invoice line charge percentage, to calculate the Invoice line charge amount. The percentage that may be used, in
Invoice line charge percentage
conjunction with the Invoice line charge base amount, to calculate the Invoice line charge amount.
Invoice line charge reason
The reason for the Invoice line charge, expressed as text.
Invoice line charge reason code
The reason for the Invoice line
Item attribute name
The name of the attribute or property of the item.
Item attribute value
The value of the attribute or property of the item.
